name: Cloud-Shape LED Backlit Mirror
description: Organic irregular silhouette with warm-white edge lighting. Touch-sensor on/off. Creates a dramatic vanity focal point in any bathroom or bedroom.

name: Matte Black Waterfall Sensor Tap
description: Touchless infrared sensor with flat-top waterfall flow. Matte black stainless finish — modern, hygienic and effortlessly stylish.

name: Chrome Rainfall Shower System
description: Square overhead rain head, adjustable handheld spray, wall-mount mixer. Polished chrome — timeless luxury for your shower space.

name: Workstation Kitchen Sink 7545B
description: Gunmetal nano coating. Built-in chopping board, colander, and pull-out faucet included. Model 7545B — the complete kitchen upgrade.

name: Complete Shower Installation Set
description: Everything included — overhead panel, handheld head, mixer valve, 150cm shower hose and chrome support rods. Ready to install.
